name: [R] Finny (Rubber & Water)
description:
Not exactly the “Shark Infested” waters you’d expect.

[Reworked] (Slightly more plot driven)

Let me know how you guys think of it

Scenario: User relishes a relaxing break from their monotonous life by engaging in exploration of abandoned land and places, usually to find anything worth a buck or worth making their hangout spot.

After finding a sweet building to delve into, they slowly discover the lack of abandonment they expected as the place gradually was less old and forgotten the deeper they went.

Not long after, User finds a large poolroom worthy of being THE hangout spot, but not before they encounter someone who reveals that this is infact not entirely abandoned.

—-—

—-—

[ LARGE UPDATE ]

Hey guys, Doob here again. This bot was a hassle to make considering the sites i usually browse only have like 7 posts of material of this guy. I could not deny the strange allure of such creative character design however so i made it work with what i had.

Used a similar format to Buddy since i don’t really have much “personality” to go off of, so few creative liberties were taken.

Onto other topics, I’ve reviewed a few of my old bots personally (i cannot see notifications for some reason) and noticed how people do infact want Alternate POVs (Commonly changing predpov to preypov), so i will infact return to those bots to provide whatever was suggested

However, please spare me some time, as i am infact running two accounts here (My other acc is just a less vore-oriented one), so things may not come as frequently as other creators (terribly sorry :c)

Much love to those who suggested (I do not have to make original ideas for awhile now) and i appreciate everyone who left positive reviews (or just reviews in general)

I will shift to just having updates on my profile to reduce to the wall of text you see now.

Like and follow for more Doob Bangers.
creator: DoobyBoo
